prompt: A close-up shot captures a person in a white apron over a shirt with small white and blue square patterns, holding a plate with a yellow rim and a beige center. The individual uses a spoon in their right hand to interact with the food, which appears to be a mixture of yellowish and whitish chunks, possibly mashed or shredded. The person's left hand, gripping the plate, moves slightly, touching the spoon to the food. The background transitions from a turquoise area with dark patterns to a mustard-colored section on the right. The scene is brightly lit, with reflections visible on the plate's yellow section. The person's movements are subtle, involving back-and-forth plate motions and spoon interactions. The camera maintains a static, eye-level angle throughout the video.
